reproAttempts.name: desktop nav Resources item
reproAttempts.sequence: Tab x8 to left nav Resources; Enter; Shift+Tab
reproAttempts.result: Focus moved from Resources nav item to Settings header button, the immediately previous interactive element in DOM/tab order.

reproAttempts.name: desktop Resources view tab with update message visible
reproAttempts.sequence: Tab x16 to Resources tab inside Resources page; Enter; Shift+Tab; Shift+Tab
reproAttempts.result: Focus moved to search input, then update message Ignore button. This matches preceding focus order observed in the JSON trail.

reproAttempts.name: desktop Resources view tab after dismissing update message
reproAttempts.sequence: Dismiss update message; Tab to Resources tab; Enter; Shift+Tab; Shift+Tab
reproAttempts.result: Focus moved to search input, then Metrics nav item. This is the logical reverse order once the message bar is gone.

reproAttempts.name: narrow/mobile Resources menu item
reproAttempts.sequence: Tab to navigation button; Enter; Tab to Resources menu item; Enter; Shift+Tab
reproAttempts.result: Focus returned to the navigation button after the menu item activated and closed.

reproAttempts.name: resource filter popover probe
reproAttempts.sequence: Programmatically focus filter trigger; Enter; Shift+Tab; Tab
reproAttempts.result: Popover focused first checkbox; Shift+Tab moved to search. The trigger currently has tabindex=-1, so this appears to be Fluent Popover/focus behavior rather than a Resources tab repro.

attachment: Downloaded to ../issue-attachment.mp4; ffprobe failed because local ffmpeg is missing libx265. Browser frame extraction did not complete, so reproduction is based on live Playwright evidence and the issue text/comments.
tests: Not run; no code changes were made.
